message:
test: add regression reproductions for security fixes and edge cases

New test files covering bugs fixed in this batch:

Security reproductions:
- repro_exec_mediation_bypass.rs: Verify "rm -rf /." is classified as
  RecursiveDelete (was bypassing command normalization).
- repro_ext_path_traversal.rs: Verify module resolution blocks
  "../secret.js" imports that escape the extension root directory.
- repro_symlink_monotonicity.rs: Verify repair monotonicity checks
  work correctly when the extension root is accessed through a symlink.
- redaction_test.rs: Verify secret redaction handles escaped quotes
  inside double-quoted values without premature termination.

Tool edge case reproductions:
- repro_edit_newline_shift.rs: Verify edit tool correctly handles
  replacements on subsequent lines (off-by-one at newline boundaries).
- repro_read_large_file.rs: Verify read tool with large offset values
  on files with many lines returns correct line ranges.

Session/storage reproduction:
- reproduce_index_gap.rs: Verify session store v2 index rebuild
  handles corrupted segments gracefully (skips subsequent segments
  after corruption).

Integration test:
- agent_context_filtering.rs: Verify that hidden custom messages
  (display:false) are filtered from provider context via a capturing
  mock provider.

Placeholder:
- tests/repro/partial_save_bug.rs: Empty file placeholder for
  future partial-save reproduction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
